caption:
The reply window just got shorter.

EZ Texting surveyed 959 US consumers in 2026. 87% check a new text within 15 minutes. Nearly 70% expect a reply within an hour, even from a business they've never used before.

65% said they prefer appointment reminders by text over any other message type.

A widely cited Kellogg School/Harvard Business Review study found that responding to a lead within 5 minutes makes you 21 times more likely to qualify it than waiting 30 minutes.

This week: pull your last 20 leads. Count how many got a text back within 60 minutes. Every miss expected faster than they got.

DM "TEXT" for an automated system that replies to every lead within 5 minutes.

#leadresponse #servicebusiness #smallbusinessmarketing #homeservices #contractor
rationale: Fills the under-served third-party research slot with a fresh, credibly sourced 2026 survey (EZ Texting, 959 US consumers) distinct from prior HubSpot-sourced posts. Replaces the original draft's unsourced '17% of businesses / roughly double' close-rate claim with a real, citable lead-response study, keeping the numeric hook without inventing a stat. Carousel format matches how research-driven educational content performs for this audience.
